Headline: #73 Armitage Temporary Reroute near Armitage/Bissell
ShortDescription: Eastbound 73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Armitage/Bissell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted via Armitage, Sheffield, Fullerton, Halsted, Armitage then resume their normal route, due to street blockage near Armitage/Bissell.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
